_comment: Synthetic meeting recaps + transcript excerpts + action items for the Brightwater engagement. action_items carry their own ids, owners (people ids), due dates, status. MTG-003 is restricted (client-confidential).

meetings.title: Brightwater Sprint 14 Standup
meetings.recap: Latest Brightwater standup (11-JUN, sprint 14). The team committed for this sprint to: complete the data migration cutover by the recovery date of 26-JUN, close the two open integration defects, and deliver the integration test report this week. Priya owns the cutover recovery; Amir owns the integration test report. The open reporting-module scope change was noted as out-of-scope pending a change request.
meetings.transcript_excerpt: Priya Deshmukh: 'Cutover is the priority — two defects left, we burn them down daily and hit 26-JUN.' Amir Haddad: 'Integration test report lands this week regardless.' Priya Deshmukh: 'The reporting module is new scope — nobody starts it until the change request is approved.'

action_items.text: Close the two open integration defects and complete the migration cutover by 26-JUN
Deliver the Brightwater integration test report this week
Raise a change request for the reporting-module scope with effort estimate

meetings.title: Brightwater Sprint 14 Standup
meetings.recap: Prior standup (09-JUN). The migration cutover risk was raised: two integration defects threatened the 19-JUN date. The team agreed to re-baseline if the defects were not closed by mid-week. No recovery date committed yet at this point.
meetings.transcript_excerpt: Amir Haddad: 'Two integration defects are blocking cutover.' Priya Deshmukh: 'If they're not closed by Wednesday we move the date and tell Nina.'

action_items.text: Triage the two integration defects blocking cutover

meetings.title: Brightwater Client QBR Prep (commercial)
meetings.recap: Client QBR prep with the Brightwater partner and director. Reviewed commercial standing, margin, and the client's appetite for the reporting-module expansion. (Restricted: commercial / client-confidential.)
meetings.transcript_excerpt: Gerald Mosby: 'Margin is tight on this engagement; the reporting module needs to be paid scope.' Sofia Marin: 'Agreed — no free work, route it through a change request.'

action_items.text: Confirm commercial terms for the reporting-module expansion before QBR
